strName.description: The code name of the condition trigger, as referred to in other files.

strCondName.description: Name of the condition this trigger sets — refers to entry within conditions.json

aReqs.description: Conditions OR condition triggers that must be present for this trigger to fire. Per IVerifiable / CondTrigger, each entry is dual-type: checked against condtrigs/ first, then conditions/. Refers to entry within condtrigs.json with fallback to conditions.json.

aForbids.description: Conditions OR condition triggers that must NOT be present for this trigger to fire. Dual-type per IVerifiable. Refers to entry within condtrigs.json with fallback to conditions.json.

aTriggers.description: Other condition triggers chained by this one. Per IVerifiable, dual-type with condition-name fallback. Refers to entry within condtrigs.json with fallback to conditions.json.

aTriggersForbid.description: Other condition triggers / conditions whose presence forbids this trigger from chaining further. Dual-type per IVerifiable. Refers to entry within condtrigs.json with fallback to conditions.json.
